Class DeliverabilitySelectorOptions

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.mailslurp.models.DeliverabilitySelectorOptions

        public DeliverabilitySelectorOptions pattern(@Nullable
                                             String pattern)

      • getPattern

        @Nullable
public String getPattern()
        Wildcard pattern for PATTERN selection. Supports '*' and '?' wildcards. If no wildcard is present the value is treated as a case-insensitive contains match.
        Returns:
        pattern

      • setPattern

        public void setPattern(@Nullable
                       String pattern)

      • phoneCountry

        public DeliverabilitySelectorOptions phoneCountry(@Nullable
                                                  DeliverabilitySelectorOptions.PhoneCountryEnum phoneCountry)

      • getPhoneCountry

        @Nullable
public DeliverabilitySelectorOptions.PhoneCountryEnum getPhoneCountry()
        Optional phone-country filter for PHONE scope selection (e.g. ALL phones in US). Must be null for INBOX scope.
        Returns:
        phoneCountry

                            DeliverabilitySelectorOptions.PhoneCountryEnum phoneCountry)
